project_context.vibe: Calm, spacious, soulful, premium, earthy. Rooted in the spiritual essence of Varanasi but executed with modern boutique refinement.

headings.rationale: Provides an elegant, traditional, and timeless feel suitable for a premium spiritual/cultural stay. Breaks away from generic sans-serifs.

body.rationale: Clean, highly readable, yet warm geometric sans-serif that balances the classic serif headings.

rules: NEVER use Inter or Space Grotesk.
Overlines/labels must be uppercase with wide letter-spacing.
Body text should be left-aligned for readability, only center headings intentionally for visual rhythm.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF. Stick to the tinted Bone White and Charcoal.
No purple or teal gradients. Strictly organic, earthy tones.
Ensure 4.5:1 contrast for all text against backgrounds.
Hover states must be explicitly styled (e.g., hover:bg-[#8C3C2B] hover:text-white).

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Treat sections like pages in a high-end magazine.

grids.bento_gallery: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. The Hero image spans 8 cols, tall images span 4 cols, wide images span 6 cols.
grids.general: Start with grid-cols-1 for mobile, expand gracefully on tablet/desktop.

surfaces.radius: rounded-none sm:rounded-sm (Keep corners slightly sharp or minimally rounded for elegance. No overly bubbly shapes.)
surfaces.shadows: Minimal. shadow-sm on interactive cards, mostly rely on 1px borders to separate elements.

components_strategy.structural: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts (Hero, Gallery, About).
components_strategy.interactive: Heavily customize Shadcn components for forms, date pickers, and inputs to match the brand colors and typography. DO NOT use default Shadcn styles.
components_strategy.buttons: Flat background, sharp/slight radius, uppercase text with slight tracking. Example: bg-[#AF4F3B] text-white hover:bg-[#8C3C2B].
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for a delicate, refined look.

hero.layout: Asymmetrical split. 40% text left, 60% prominent image right.
hero.content: Homestay Name ('Varanasi Paradise'), tagline evoking the soul of Kashi, and a prominent 'Book Now' CTA.

about.layout: Text-heavy column next to an overlapping image. Use the floral texture subtly behind the text container.
about.content: Story of the homestay, proximity to temples/ghats, peaceful vibe.

gallery.layout: Tetris grid. Staggered images with different aspect ratios.
gallery.content: Showcase bedrooms, patio with greenery, living spaces.

amenities.layout: Dense grid (4 columns desktop) with small icons.
amenities.content: Highlight fast WiFi, AC, Smart TV, Kitchen, free parking.

location.layout: Full-width section with the Varanasi ghats background image, text card overlaying the image on the left.
location.content: Central location details, nearby attractions (Kashi Vishwanath, Assi Ghat).

host.content: Meet Yogendra. Superhost, 3 years hosting. Highlights trust and local hospitality.

booking_form.layout: Contained card form using customized Shadcn inputs.
booking_form.content: Name, Email, Dates (Datepicker), Guests (Select), Message (Textarea), Submit CTA.

hero_image.description: Main living/bedroom space, bright and welcoming.

environmental_textures.description: Varanasi waterfront sunset. Use for the Location section background with a dark/warm overlay.
Marigold floral texture. Use with very low opacity (e.g., 5-10%) or blend modes in the background of the About or Reviews section.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Gentle, organic motion. No aggressive bounces.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Soft background transitions (duration-300 ease-in-out). Image scales slightly on hover (scale-105) inside a hidden overflow container.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Staggered fade-up (opacity-0 translate-y-8 to opacity-100 translate-y-0) for gallery images and text blocks.

required_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
testing_and_accessibility.focus_states: MUST have higher contrast than default state (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#AF4F3B] focus:ring-offset-2).
testing_and_accessibility.aria: Use aria-hidden='true' for purely decorative background images and icons.

instructions_to_main_agent.css_setup: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette provided above and ensure fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Outfit) are imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_building: Prioritize optical alignment over geometric. Start with mobile-first grid-cols-1 layouts. Use raw Tailwind for the main landing page structure, only invoking Shadcn for the booking form interactions.
instructions_to_main_agent.images: Strictly use the provided Airbnb URLs for property imagery and the provided Pexels URLs for atmospheric backgrounds. Do NOT use placeholders.
instructions_to_main_agent.file_type: Generate .js and .jsx files, not .tsx. Use standard React.
